case_title: E.O.C. ORD, INC., VS. MAY Y. NOVAK ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-09-2021 CONTINUED TO SEP-08-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN JUDGMENT. *** NOTE: DEPT. 610 DOES NOT ENETER JUDGMENTS. THE PROPOSED JUDGMENT WAS REJECTED ON 8/21/20, FOR QUESTIONS REGARDING THE REJECT NOTICE, PLEASE CALL THE DEFAULTS SECTION IN ROOM 103.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF E.O.C. ORD, INC., A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, D/B/A ORD & NORMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOVAK, MAY Y. $75,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $9,433.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $84,433.00, PLUS INTEREST IN THE SUM OF 10% PER ANNUM THAT HAS ACCRUED FROM JUNE 1, 2020 PURSUANT TO A SETTLMENT AGREEMENT DATED AUGUST 7, 2020, PLUS REASONABLE, ACTUAL AND VERIFIABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN ENFORCING THIS JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOC REGARDING REMAINING STIPULATIONS. SEE SCANNED DOC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 74247447) FILED BY PLAINTIFF E.O.C. ORD, INC., A CALIFORNIA PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION, D/B/A ORD & NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT NOVAK, MAY Y.
